title: Death And Life.
content:
Apparently with no surprise
    To any happy flower,
    The frost beheads it at its play
    In accidental power.
    The blond assassin passes on,
    The sun proceeds unmoved
    To measure off another day
    For an approving God.
meaning:
"Death And Life." is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
